links.content: We collect submitted contact details only to respond to your consultation request, coordinate appointment options, and provide patient support. We do not sell your personal information. You can contact hello@ipdental.com to request access, correction, or deletion of your submitted information.

By submitting an inquiry, you agree that Istanbul Premium Dental may contact you about your request. Information on this page is for consultation purposes only and does not replace an in-person diagnosis or professional medical advice. Treatment plans and eligibility are confirmed after clinical review.

footer.disclaimer: Medical disclaimer: Results may vary. Please consult with our certified doctors.

data.title: Excellence in Dental Care
paragraphs: Founded by Dr. Kaya in 2005, our clinic has served over 5,000 international patients...

items.question: Do you arrange flights?
items.answer: We assist with booking, but flights are not included in the base package.
